description: Party strongholds derived from 2011–2023 presidential election national totals and 2023 gubernatorial results. State-level presidential vote shares not retrieved; patterns inferred from states-won data.
notes: This file contains inferred regional patterns based on available national summary data and Wikipedia descriptions. NOT sourced from full state-by-state vote tables (those are in elections/ folder, mostly gaps).
All patterns marked provenance_type='inferred_pattern' should be treated as priors, not measurements.
For verified state-level vote shares, operator must populate elections/*/presidential.json by_state arrays.

data.notes_2023: Won 12 states in 2023 presidential; held 21 governorships after 2023 elections.
Won 12 states in 2023 presidential. Historically dominant 1999-2015 across most zones.
Peter Obi won SE states + FCT + Lagos in 2023. 2027 situation changed by Obi's defection to ADC.
Kwankwaso won Kano State presidential in 2023; NNPP holds Kano governorship.

data.notes: APGA has held Anambra governorship through APGA-affiliated governors since 2006 (aside from brief interruptions).

sources.name: Wikipedia — List of political parties in Nigeria

gaps.note: LGA-level stronghold mapping requires full state-by-state and LGA-level election results — not yet retrieved.
State-level presidential votes for 2011-2019 needed to compute trend.
